auth_rules.redis_required: token must also exist in Redis to be valid

prompts.name: shared-types
prompts.description: Shared TypeScript types for the auth domain in packages/types

prompts.name: common-files
prompts.description: Create common enums, decorators and filters
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, enum, decorator, or filter. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts if it does not already exist:
- export enum Role { PATIENT = 'patient', CLINIC = 'clinic', PROFESSIONAL = 'professional', ATTENDANT = 'attendant' }

Create apps/api/src/common/decorators/current-user.decorator.ts if it does not already exist:
- export const CurrentUser = createParamDecorator((data: unknown, ctx: ExecutionContext): string => { const request = ctx.switchToHttp().getRequest(); return request.user?.userId; })
- Import createParamDecorator and ExecutionContext from '@nestjs/common'

Create apps/api/src/common/filters/all-exceptions.filter.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Catch() class AllExceptionsFilter implements ExceptionFilter
- catch(exception: unknown, host: ArgumentsHost): void
- Returns JSON: { statusCode, message, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
- Handles HttpException for status and message, defaults to 500 Internal Server Error
- Import ExceptionFilter, Catch, ArgumentsHost, HttpException, HttpStatus from '@nestjs/common'
- Import Response from 'express'

prompts.name: user-schema
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/auth/schemas/user.schema.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing field, decorator, or export. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/auth/schemas/user.schema.ts if it does not already exist:
- Import Role from apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts
- @Schema({ timestamps: true }) on the class
- Fields:
  - role: Role — @Prop({ type: String, enum: Role, required: true, immutable: true })
  - email?: string — @Prop({ type: String, unique: true, sparse: true })
  - username?: string — @Prop({ type: String, unique: true, sparse: true })
  - clinicId?: Types.ObjectId — @Prop({ type: Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Clinic', sparse: true })
  - passwordHash: string — @Prop({ type: String, required: true, select: false })
- Export: UserDocument = User & Document, UserSchema = SchemaFactory.createForClass(User)
- Add compound sparse indexes after schema creation:
  - UserSchema.index({ role: 1, email: 1 }, { unique: true, sparse: true })
  - UserSchema.index({ clinicId: 1, username: 1 }, { unique: true, sparse: true })

If the file already exists, only add what is missing — do NOT recreate it from scratch.

prompts.name: clinic-professional-schemas
prompts.description: Create Mongoose schemas for Clinic, Professional and ClinicProfessional
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read each of the listed files if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing field, decorator, index, or export. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts if it does not already exist:
- export enum SubscriptionStatus { ACTIVE = 'active', INACTIVE = 'inactive', TRIAL = 'trial' }
- @Schema({ timestamps: true }) class Clinic
- Fields:
  - name: string — @Prop({ type: String, required: true })
  - subscriptionStatus: SubscriptionStatus — @Prop({ type: String, enum: SubscriptionStatus, default: SubscriptionStatus.TRIAL })
- Export: ClinicDocument = Clinic & Document, ClinicSchema = SchemaFactory.createForClass(Clinic)

Create apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/professional.schema.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Schema({ timestamps: true }) class Professional
- Fields:
  - specialty: string — @Prop({ type: String, required: true })
  - userId: Types.ObjectId — @Prop({ type: Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true, unique: true })
- Export: ProfessionalDocument = Professional & Document, ProfessionalSchema = SchemaFactory.createForClass(Professional)

Create apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/clinic-professional.schema.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Schema({ timestamps: true }) class ClinicProfessional
- Fields:
  - clinicId: Types.ObjectId — @Prop({ type: Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Clinic', required: true })
  - professionalId: Types.ObjectId — @Prop({ type: Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Professional', required: true })
- Export: ClinicProfessionalDocument = ClinicProfessional & Document, ClinicProfessionalSchema = SchemaFactory.createForClass(ClinicProfessional)
- Add after schema creation: ClinicProfessionalSchema.index({ clinicId: 1, professionalId: 1 }, { unique: true })

If any file already exists, only add what is missing — do NOT recreate it from scratch.

prompts.name: users-module
prompts.description: UsersModule with repository, service and bcrypt password hashing
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, method, import, or module registration. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

The User schema already exists at apps/api/src/auth/schemas/user.schema.ts — import it from there. Do NOT create a new schema.
The Role enum already exists at apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts — import it from there. Do NOT recreate it.

Create apps/api/src/users/users.repository.ts:
- @Injectable() class UsersRepository
- constructor injects @InjectModel(User.name) private userModel: Model<UserDocument>
- create(data: Partial<User>): Promise<UserDocument> — new this.userModel(data).save()
- findByEmailAndRole(email: string, role: Role): Promise<UserDocument | null> — findOne({ email, role }).select('+passwordHash')
- findByClinicIdAndUsername(clinicId: string, username: string): Promise<UserDocument | null> — findOne({ clinicId, username }).select('+passwordHash')
- findById(id: string): Promise<UserDocument | null> — findById(id)

Create apps/api/src/users/users.service.ts:
- @Injectable() class UsersService
- constructor injects UsersRepository
- hashPassword(plain: string): Promise<string> — bcrypt.hash(plain, 12)
- comparePassword(plain: string, hash: string): Promise<boolean> — bcrypt.compare(plain, hash)
- createUser(dto: { role: Role; email?: string; username?: string; clinicId?: string; password: string }): Promise<UserDocument>
  - attendant role: requires username and clinicId, throws BadRequestException if email provided
  - non-attendant roles: requires email, throws BadRequestException if username or clinicId provided
  - hashes password, calls usersRepository.create()
  - catches MongoDB error code 11000 and throws ConflictException
- findByEmailAndRole(email: string, role: Role): Promise<UserDocument | null> — delegates to repository
- findByClinicIdAndUsername(clinicId: string, username: string): Promise<UserDocument | null> — delegates to repository
- getById(id: string): Promise<UserDocument> — calls repository.findById(id), throws NotFoundException if null

Create apps/api/src/users/users.module.ts:
- imports MongooseModule.forFeature([{ name: User.name, schema: UserSchema }]) — User and UserSchema from apps/api/src/auth/schemas/user.schema.ts
- provides UsersRepository and UsersService
- exports UsersService and UsersRepository

prompts.name: redis-module
prompts.description: Redis service for revocable JWT session management
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, method, or provider. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/redis/redis.service.ts:
- @Injectable() class RedisService
- constructor(private configService: ConfigService)
- private client: Redis — created in constructor: new Redis(this.configService.get('REDIS_URL') || 'redis://localhost:6379')
- Import Redis from 'ioredis'
- Import ConfigService from '@nestjs/config'
- saveToken(userId: string, token: string, ttlSeconds: number): Promise<void> — this.client.setex(`auth:token:${userId}`, ttlSeconds, token)
- getToken(userId: string): Promise<string | null> — this.client.get(`auth:token:${userId}`)
- validateToken(userId: string, token: string): Promise<boolean> — const stored = await this.getToken(userId); return stored === token
- removeToken(userId: string): Promise<void> — this.client.del(`auth:token:${userId}`)

Create apps/api/src/redis/redis.module.ts:
- @Global() decorator
- @Module({ providers: [RedisService], exports: [RedisService] })
- Import Global and Module from '@nestjs/common'

prompts.name: auth-module
prompts.description: Auth DTOs, service, controller and module with signup, login and logout
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, method, DTO, import, or decorator. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

The Role enum already exists at apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts — import from there. Do NOT recreate it.
The User schema already exists at apps/api/src/auth/schemas/user.schema.ts — do NOT recreate it.
The @CurrentUser() decorator already exists at apps/api/src/common/decorators/current-user.decorator.ts — do NOT recreate it.

Create apps/api/src/auth/dto/login-standard.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- LoginStandardDto: email (@IsEmail()), password (@IsString(), @MinLength(8))

Create apps/api/src/auth/dto/login-attendant.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- LoginAttendantDto: clinicId (@IsMongoId()), username (@IsString()), password (@IsString(), @MinLength(8))

Create apps/api/src/auth/dto/signup.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- SignupDto: role (@IsEnum(Role)), email? (@IsEmail(), @IsOptional()), username? (@IsString(), @IsOptional()), clinicId? (@IsMongoId(), @IsOptional()), password (@IsString(), @MinLength(8))

Create apps/api/src/auth/auth.service.ts:
- @Injectable() class AuthService
- constructor injects UsersService, JwtService, ConfigService, RedisService
- signup(dto: SignupDto): Promise<IAuthTokens>
  - calls usersService.createUser(dto)
  - const userId = user._id.toString()
  - signs JWT: jwtService.sign({ sub: userId, role: user.role })
  - calls redisService.saveToken(userId, token, 7 * 24 * 3600)
  - returns { accessToken: token }
- loginStandard(dto: LoginStandardDto): Promise<IAuthTokens>
  - calls usersService.findByEmailAndRole(dto.email, Role.PATIENT)
  - throws UnauthorizedException if null
  - calls usersService.comparePassword(dto.password, user.passwordHash)
  - throws UnauthorizedException if false
  - signs JWT, saves to Redis, returns { accessToken }
- loginAttendant(dto: LoginAttendantDto): Promise<IAuthTokens>
  - calls usersService.findByClinicIdAndUsername(dto.clinicId, dto.username)
  - throws UnauthorizedException if null
  - calls usersService.comparePassword(dto.password, user.passwordHash)
  - throws UnauthorizedException if false
  - signs JWT, saves to Redis, returns { accessToken }
- logout(userId: string): Promise<void> — calls redisService.removeToken(userId)
- IAuthTokens is imported from '@medicano/types'
- JWT secret: configService.get('JWT_SECRET'), expiry: '7d'

Create apps/api/src/auth/auth.controller.ts:
- @Controller('auth') class AuthController
- constructor injects AuthService
- POST /auth/signup — public, @HttpCode(201), calls authService.signup(dto: SignupDto)
- POST /auth/login — public, @HttpCode(200), calls authService.loginStandard(dto: LoginStandardDto)
- POST /auth/login/attendant — public, @HttpCode(200), calls authService.loginAttendant(dto: LoginAttendantDto)
- POST /auth/logout — @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard), @HttpCode(204), uses @CurrentUser() to get userId, calls authService.logout(userId), returns void
- JwtAuthGuard is at apps/api/src/auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts

Create apps/api/src/auth/auth.module.ts:
- imports JwtModule.registerAsync({ useFactory: (config: ConfigService) => ({ secret: config.get('JWT_SECRET'), signOptions: { expiresIn: '7d' } }), inject: [ConfigService] })
- imports PassportModule
- imports UsersModule from apps/api/src/users/users.module.ts
- provides AuthService
- controllers: [AuthController]
- exports AuthService

prompts.name: jwt-strategy-and-guards
prompts.description: JWT strategy with Redis dual-validation, guards and roles decorator
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, method, guard, decorator, or import. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

IMPORTANT — these already exist, do NOT recreate them:
- @CurrentUser() decorator is at apps/api/src/common/decorators/current-user.decorator.ts
- Role enum is at apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts

Create apps/api/src/auth/jwt.strategy.ts:
- @Injectable() class JwtStrategy extends PassportStrategy(Strategy)
- Import Strategy from 'passport-jwt', PassportStrategy from '@nestjs/passport', ExtractJwt from 'passport-jwt'
- constructor(private configService: ConfigService, private redisService: RedisService)
- super({ jwtFromRequest: ExtractJwt.fromAuthHeaderAsBearerToken(), secretOrKey: configService.get('JWT_SECRET'), passReqToCallback: false })
- async validate(payload: { sub: string; role: Role }): Promise<{ userId: string; role: Role }>
  - const token = await redisService.getToken(payload.sub)
  - if (!token) throw new UnauthorizedException('Session expired or revoked')
  - return { userId: payload.sub, role: payload.role }

Create apps/api/src/auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Injectable() class JwtAuthGuard extends AuthGuard('jwt')
- Import Injectable from '@nestjs/common', AuthGuard from '@nestjs/passport'

Create apps/api/src/auth/guards/roles.guard.ts:
- @Injectable() class RolesGuard implements CanActivate
- constructor(private reflector: Reflector)
- canActivate(context: ExecutionContext): boolean
  - const roles = this.reflector.get<Role[]>('roles', context.getHandler())
  - if (!roles) return true
  - const { user } = context.switchToHttp().getRequest()
  - return roles.includes(user.role)

Create apps/api/src/auth/decorators/roles.decorator.ts:
- export const Roles = (...roles: Role[]) => SetMetadata('roles', roles)
- Import SetMetadata from '@nestjs/common', Role from apps/api/src/common/enums/role.enum.ts

Update apps/api/src/auth/auth.module.ts: add JwtStrategy and RolesGuard to providers array if not already present. Do not remove or modify any existing providers, imports, or exports.

prompts.name: clinics-and-professionals-modules
prompts.description: Create ClinicsModule, ProfessionalsModule and ClinicProfessionalsModule with full CRUD
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class, method, DTO, or module. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

The schemas already exist — import them, do NOT recreate them:
- Clinic schema: apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts (exports Clinic, ClinicDocument, ClinicSchema, SubscriptionStatus)
- Professional schema: apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/professional.schema.ts (exports Professional, ProfessionalDocument, ProfessionalSchema)
- ClinicProfessional schema: apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/clinic-professional.schema.ts (exports ClinicProfessional, ClinicProfessionalDocument, ClinicProfessionalSchema)

JwtAuthGuard is at apps/api/src/auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts — import it, do NOT recreate it.
@CurrentUser() is at apps/api/src/common/decorators/current-user.decorator.ts — import it, do NOT recreate it.

Create DTOs if they do not already exist:
- CreateClinicDto: name (@IsString(), @IsNotEmpty()), subscriptionStatus? (@IsEnum(SubscriptionStatus), @IsOptional())
- UpdateClinicDto: name? (@IsString(), @IsNotEmpty(), @IsOptional()), subscriptionStatus? (@IsEnum(SubscriptionStatus), @IsOptional())
- CreateProfessionalDto: specialty (@IsString(), @IsNotEmpty()), userId (@IsMongoId(), @IsNotEmpty())
- UpdateProfessionalDto: specialty? (@IsString(), @IsNotEmpty(), @IsOptional())

Create ClinicsService if it does not already exist: create, findAll, findById (throws NotFoundException), update (throws NotFoundException), remove (throws NotFoundException). Always validate ObjectId with Types.ObjectId.isValid().
Create ClinicsController @Controller('clinics') @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard): POST /, GET /, GET /:id, PUT /:id, DELETE /:id.
Create ClinicsModule: imports MongooseModule with Clinic schema, provides ClinicsService, exports ClinicsService and MongooseModule.

Create ProfessionalsService if it does not already exist: create (validates userId ObjectId, catches 11000 ConflictException), findAll, findById, update, remove.
Create ProfessionalsController @Controller('professionals') @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard): POST /, GET /, GET /:id, PUT /:id, DELETE /:id.
Create ProfessionalsModule: imports MongooseModule with Professional schema, provides ProfessionalsService, exports ProfessionalsService and MongooseModule.

Create ClinicProfessionalsService if it does not already exist:
- assignProfessionalToClinic(clinicId, professionalId): validates ObjectIds, verifies clinic and professional exist, saves ClinicProfessional, catches 11000 ConflictException
- getProfessionalsByClinic(clinicId): validates ObjectId, verifies clinic exists, returns professionals
- removeProfessionalFromClinic(clinicId, professionalId): validates ObjectIds, throws NotFoundException if assignment not found

Create ClinicProfessionalsController @Controller('clinics') @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard):
- POST /clinics/:clinicId/professionals/:professionalId
- GET /clinics/:clinicId/professionals
- DELETE /clinics/:clinicId/professionals/:professionalId

Create ClinicProfessionalsModule: imports MongooseModule with ClinicProfessional and Professional schemas, imports ClinicsModule and ProfessionalsModule, provides ClinicProfessionalsService, exports ClinicProfessionalsService.

prompts.name: app-module-and-main
prompts.description: Create AppModule wiring all modules together and main.ts bootstrap
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing import or module registration. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/app.module.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Module() class AppModule
- imports:
  - ConfigModule.forRoot({ isGlobal: true })
  - MongooseModule.forRootAsync({ imports: [ConfigModule], useFactory: (configService: ConfigService) => ({ uri: configService.get<string>('MONGODB_URI') || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/medicano' }), inject: [ConfigService] })
  - RedisModule from apps/api/src/redis/redis.module.ts
  - AuthModule from apps/api/src/auth/auth.module.ts
  - UsersModule from apps/api/src/users/users.module.ts
  - ClinicsModule from apps/api/src/clinics/clinics.module.ts
  - ProfessionalsModule from apps/api/src/professionals/professionals.module.ts
  - ClinicProfessionalsModule from apps/api/src/professionals/clinic-professionals.module.ts

Create apps/api/src/main.ts if it does not already exist:
- NestFactory.create(AppModule)
- app.useGlobalPipes(new ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true, transform: true }))
- app.useGlobalFilters(new AllExceptionsFilter()) — import from apps/api/src/common/filters/all-exceptions.filter.ts
- app.enableCors()
- const port = process.env.PORT ?? 3000
- await app.listen(port)
- Logger.log(`Application running on port ${port}`, 'Bootstrap')

If either file already exists and is correct, make no changes to it.

prompts.name: auth-tests
prompts.description: Unit and E2E tests for auth: hashing, login, JWT, Redis, logout
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing test, describe block, or mock. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/auth/tests/auth.service.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- Mock UsersService, RedisService, JwtService using jest.fn()
- Do NOT use @InjectModel or real DB connections
- Test signup: creates user, signs JWT with { sub, role }, saves to Redis with TTL 7*24*3600, returns { accessToken }
- Test signup: propagates ConflictException if usersService.createUser throws
- Test loginStandard: calls usersService.findByEmailAndRole(email, Role.PATIENT), returns accessToken for valid credentials
- Test loginStandard: throws UnauthorizedException if user not found (findByEmailAndRole returns null)
- Test loginStandard: throws UnauthorizedException if comparePassword returns false
- Test loginAttendant: calls usersService.findByClinicIdAndUsername(clinicId, username), returns accessToken
- Test loginAttendant: throws UnauthorizedException if attendant not found
- Test loginAttendant: throws UnauthorizedException if password wrong
- Test logout: calls redisService.removeToken with correct userId
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Create apps/api/src/auth/tests/redis.service.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- Mock ioredis: jest.mock('ioredis', () => jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => mockRedisClient))
- mockRedisClient has: setex, get, del as jest.fn()
- RedisService creates its ioredis client in the constructor — do NOT call onModuleInit()
- Test saveToken: calls setex with key 'auth:token:{userId}', TTL, and token
- Test saveToken: overwrites existing token for same userId
- Test getToken: returns stored token, calls get with 'auth:token:{userId}'
- Test getToken: returns null if not found
- Test validateToken: returns true when token matches
- Test validateToken: returns false when token does not match
- Test validateToken: returns false when no token stored
- Test removeToken: calls del with 'auth:token:{userId}'
- Test removeToken: does not throw if key does not exist
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Create apps/api/src/auth/tests/jwt.strategy.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- Mock RedisService and ConfigService using jest.fn()
- Import JwtStrategy from '../jwt.strategy' (NOT from a strategies subfolder)
- Test validate: returns { userId: payload.sub, role: payload.role } when redisService.getToken returns a value
- Test validate: throws UnauthorizedException when redisService.getToken returns null
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Create apps/api/src/auth/tests/auth.e2e.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- import * as request from 'supertest' (NOT import request from 'supertest')
- Use real AppModule with TestingModule
- Apply ValidationPipe with whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true, transform: true
- Test POST /auth/signup: 201 with accessToken
- Test POST /auth/signup: 409 if user already exists
- Test POST /auth/signup: 400 for invalid payload
- Test POST /auth/login: 200 with accessToken for valid credentials
- Test POST /auth/login: 401 for wrong password
- Test POST /auth/login: 401 for non-existent user
- Test POST /auth/logout: 204 with valid Bearer token
- Test POST /auth/logout: 401 without token
- Full flow: signup → login → logout → same token rejected with 401

If all four files already exist and are correct, make no changes.
